🏗️ Hiring: Solutions Architect | Remote | $30–$150/hr
Looking for experienced Solutions Architects to design scalable, high-performance cloud systems using modern technologies.

🔹 Role: Solutions Architect
🔹 Type: Contract
🔹 Location: Remote
🔹 Pay: $30–$150/hour
🔹 Openings: 1

💡 Key Responsibilities:
• Architect scalable microservices-based solutions on AWS
• Translate business requirements into technical architectures
• Design infrastructure using Docker and Kubernetes
• Ensure reliability, security, and performance standards
• Mentor teams on cloud architecture best practices
• Document architecture decisions and technical designs
• Troubleshoot and resolve system and deployment challenges

✅ Required Skills:
• Strong experience with microservices architecture
• Expertise in AWS and cloud infrastructure
• Proficiency in Docker and Kubernetes
• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
• Excellent communication across technical and non-technical teams
• Ability to work independently in remote environments
⭐ Preferred:
• AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer, etc.)
• Experience with large-scale enterprise systems
• Leadership and mentoring experience

🔗 Apply here:
https://lnkd.in/g4YVJg8W

🚀 We’re Hiring: AI/ML Engineer with Generative AI Expertise
📍 Location: Plano, TX (Onsite)
📅 Duration: 12+ Months (W2 Contract)
We are looking for an experienced AI/ML Engineer with strong hands-on expertise in Generative AI to join a high-impact project. If you’re passionate about building cutting-edge AI solutions and working with advanced models, this is a great opportunity.
🔍 Key Responsibilities:
✔️ Design, develop, and deploy Machine Learning & Generative AI models in production
✔️ Work with advanced LLMs like GPT, LLaMA, Claude
✔️ Build and optimize RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines
✔️ Fine-tune foundation models using supervised & reinforcement learning
✔️ Develop effective prompt engineering strategies
✔️ Build scalable AI solutions on cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
✔️ Develop APIs & microservices for AI integration
✔️ Ensure Responsible AI practices (bias mitigation, explainability, governance)
✔️ Monitor and optimize model performance
🎯 Required Skills:
🔹 10+ years in ML/Deep Learning
🔹 Strong Python expertise
🔹 Hands-on with TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Hugging Face
🔹 Experience with vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate)
🔹 Knowledge of embeddings, semantic search & prompt engineering
🔹 Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, REST APIs
🔹 Familiarity with MLOps & model lifecycle management
🔹 Cloud AI experience (AWS SageMaker, Azure OpenAI, Vertex AI)
💡 Who Should Apply?
Professionals who have real-world experience building and deploying GenAI solutions and want to work on impactful enterprise AI systems.
📩 Interested candidates can reach out directly or share profiles at:
🔁 Feel free to like, comment, or share with your network!

#SiliconValley Cupertino Hiring！#ThermalSolutions
Job Title: Business Development (AI Hardware) – US Market
Location: California, USA
Job Responsibilities:
Lead the expansion of overseas markets, execute sales plans, identify potential clients, and achieve sales targets.
Conduct regular research and analysis of the assigned overseas markets, establish and maintain strong relationships with clients, nurture ongoing business with existing customers, and uncover their deeper needs.
Assist in product promotion and marketing efforts, and support communication and negotiation of contract terms.
Complete other tasks assigned by senior management.
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree or above, preferably in Polymer Materials, Mechanical Engineering, Thermodynamics, or related technical fields. Fluent in English; proficiency in Mandarin is a plus.
Minimum of 3 years of experience in thermal management solutions within the AI hardware sector.
Proven track record in business development with Tier 1 clients.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with excellent market insight; self-motivated with a strong drive for success; adept at resource integration and business execution; capable of building deep connections with clients to secure business opportunities.

🔥 Hiring Alert: Senior C++ Engineer | AI Systems Training Role (India Remote)

We’re looking for experienced C++ engineers to work on a next-generation AI initiative where your systems programming expertise will directly improve how AI models understand performance, memory behavior, and low-level software design.

This is not a traditional development role — you’ll be helping AI systems learn how real engineers think, debug, and optimize complex C++ systems.

🧾 Role: #Senior_C++ Engineer
 🌎 Location: Remote (India)
 💼 Type: Contract (Hourly)
 💲 Pay: Up to $30/hour
 🗣️ Language: English (C1+ Required)

⚙️ #What_You_Will_Work_On:
 ▪️ Review AI-generated C++ code and system designs
 ▪️ Evaluate correctness, efficiency, and memory safety
 ▪️ Detect issues in concurrency, logic, and performance
 ▪️ Assess low-level design decisions and optimization strategies
 ▪️ Write high-quality reference implementations with explanations
 ▪️ Compare and rank multiple AI-generated solutions
 ▪️ Strengthen AI reasoning in systems-level engineering problems

🧠 #Core_Expertise_Required:
 ▪️ Modern C++ (C++11/14/17/20)
 ▪️ Systems Programming & OS Concepts
 ▪️ Memory Management & Performance Tuning
 ▪️ Multithreading & Concurrency Models
 ▪️ STL, Templates, Smart Pointers
 ▪️ Debugging, Profiling & Optimization
 ▪️ Build Systems (CMake, Make, etc.)
 ▪️ CI/CD & Version Control (Git workflows)

👤 #Who_We_Are_Looking_For:
 ▪️ 4+ years of hands-on C++ production experience
 ▪️ Strong background in systems or performance-critical software
 ▪️ Proven experience in code reviews and debugging complex issues
 ▪️ Deep understanding of memory, threads, and runtime behavior
 ▪️ Ability to explain technical concepts clearly in English (C1+)
 ▪️ Familiar with testing, CI/CD pipelines, and modern tooling
 ▪️ Experience with AI evaluation or annotation is a strong advantage
 ▪️ Structured thinker with strong attention to detail

📬 Interested candidates can apply or connect directly – Umar Yaseen

🌍 We Are Hiring
🚀 Overseas Sales Manager/Director/Specialist | HVAC | USA / India / Thailand | English + Local Language

We are supporting an HVAC manufacturing company to recruit sales professionals for three regions: USA (Dallas), India (travel-based), and Thailand (Rayong). Roles vary by seniority, language, and work mode.

🔧 Responsibilities by Region

**📍 USA – Sales Manager/Director (Dallas)**
• Develop and manage HVAC sales in the US market
• Leverage existing relationships with key industry players
• Full-time, based in Dallas

**📍 India – Sales Lead/Manager (Travel)**
• Drive HVAC sales across India
• Frequent travel; potential 6–8 months/year if work visa obtained

**📍 Thailand – Sales Specialist (Rayong)**
• Handle daily sales and customer communication
• Full-time, based in Rayong

🎓 Candidate Profile

**General**
• English + local language as working languages
• 2-round video interview; contract with China headquarters

**USA (Dallas)**
• Valid US work authorization (citizen/GC/work visa)
• Fluent English
• HVAC industry background
• Preferred: prior cooperation with Carrier, Daikin, JCI, Trane, Rheem, Nordyne, Lennox

**India (Travel)**
• Fluent English + HVAC background
• Preferred: cooperation with above seven major players
• Willing to travel frequently to India

**Thailand (Rayong)**
• Japanese + English OR Thai + English (daily communication)
• ~3 years manufacturing experience, HVAC preferred
• Based in Rayong

🌍 Why This Role

• Target senior roles with flexible work modes across three key markets
• Join a growing HVAC manufacturer with global ambition
• Leverage your language and industry expertise to drive regional growth

📩 Send CV to: lapinsai.fr@gmail.com
Or connect via LinkedIn DM. WeChat: Lapins-ai

**Hiring: Remote Slack Specialist (Workflow & Automation)** 
Pay: $20 -$70/hr

We are seeking a **Slack Specialist** to optimize digital collaboration and support a cutting-edge AI training initiative.

**The Role:**
In this remote contract position, you will be the go-to expert for all things Slack. You won’t just be sending messages—you’ll be building automations, managing integrations, and training teams to use the platform as a high-performance productivity engine.

**Key Responsibilities:**
🔹 Administer and configure Slack workspaces to ensure seamless information flow.
🔹 Build and maintain **Slack workflow automations** to eliminate repetitive tasks.
🔹 Integrate Slack with third-party tools to centralize and optimize operations.
🔹 Lead remote onboarding and training sessions for new team members.
🔹 Analyze usage metrics to identify trends and improve engagement.
🔹 Troubleshoot user-level issues and provide clear, timely technical support.
🔹 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to solve communication pain points.

**Qualifications:**
✅ **Experience:** 2+ years of hands-on experience as an advanced Slack user.
✅ **Admin Skills:** Mastery of channel management, user access, and notifications.
✅ **Automation:** Proven ability to set up Slack workflows and bot integrations.
✅ **Training:** Experience delivering engaging remote training or onboarding.
✅ **Analytical:** Comfortable using Slack usage data to find areas for improvement.
✅ **Communication:** Exceptional written and verbal skills with high attention to detail.
✅ **(Preferred):** Experience supporting AI projects or working in remote-first teams.

In this episode of BetterTech, host Haseeb Khan sits down with Daniel Cohen-Dumani, Founder & CEO of Experio AI, to discuss how agentic AI is redefining the consulting and professional services industry. Daniel shares how decades in consulting shaped his vision for an AI Operating System (AIOS) built to give consultants superpowers, combining institutional knowledge, deep domain expertise, transparency, and truly collaborative human-AI workflows. He walks through the roadblocks of trust, education, and AI noise, and explains why the future belongs to firms that operationalize their knowledge and embed AI into every workflow. From team-building to scalable delivery, this episode breaks down how consulting is being rebuilt from the inside out.

In this episode the cover:

✅Defining the "AI Operating System" (AIOS) 
✅Building a Winning Team Culture 
✅The Biggest Roadblocks to AI Adoption 
✅How AI is Changing Hiring & Team Structures 
✅The Future: Agentic Workflows & Contract Intelligence

Watch the full episode here: https://lnkd.in/drKs-i9s

AI-native is easy to claim and hard to prove. If the AI broke for 30 days, would the company still be billable?

That thought experiment tells you more than a launch video, a founder memo, or an agentic product page.

If the answer is yes, the company may have excellent AI software. But the stricter company-level test has not been met. The customer is still paying for access.

I wrote a longer article on AI-native business models in 2026, and the argument is deliberately structural: look at what the company sells, how the work gets done, and what happens when the work breaks.
It looks at three layers:

Contract: does the company bill for completed work?

Operations: do agents own routine workflows?

Customer seam: does escalation carry context?

Then it applies that test across Anthropic, Cursor, Intercom Fin, Sierra, Harvey, Salesforce, Klarna, Stitch Fix, Hadrian, EvenUp, and others.
The goal is a cleaner vocabulary: AI-native, AI-enhanced, transitioning, legitimate hybrid, label-wearer.

That distinction matters for AI strategy, AI operations, enterprise architecture, and hiring. A lot of resumes and vendor decks will say "agentic" this year. Fewer will be able to explain the contract, the workflow, and the failure mode.

Full article in the comments.

#AgenticAI #AIOperations #AIStrategy

Walk into most marketing teams today, and the scene is the same. A senior marketer hired for strategy, spending seventy percent of their week on execution, an AI could do faster. An agency invoice sitting next to a list of unanswered Google reviews. And somewhere on a laptop, an AI tool the company paid for was gathering dust because nobody had time to figure it out. This is exactly the gap Jeeshan K. decided to close.

The diagnosis behind LaCleo.AI  is sharp and honest. SMBs and scaling brands today have three ways to grow, and all three are broken. Do it yourself and lose fifteen to twenty hours a week to outbound, reviews, and social. Hire a traditional agency and pay premium fees for a junior account manager working off a generic playbook. Or buy an AI tool and quietly accept that nobody has the time or technique to make it actually work. LaCleo's bet is the fourth option. A managed service, run by AI agents, supervised by humans who care about the outcome.

Founded by Jeeshan K., who himself came from an agency background, LaCleo AI runs the full marketing stack for SMBs and scaling brands. Prospecting and ICP scoring. Email marketing and copy optimisation. SEO and GEO. Reputation management and review responses. Social media and content calendars. Shopify security and vulnerability scans. AI agents do the heavy lifting across all of it, and a human from LaCleo sits on top of every critical output. Nothing goes live without a signature.

The philosophy at the heart of LaCleo is the clearest thing about the company. AI is good at execution and bad at judgment. Humans are good at judgment and bad at execution at scale, every day, without fatigue. Most AI agencies pretend AI can do both. Most traditional agencies pretend humans can do both.

LaCleo's answer is a deliberate division of labour. AI owns speed, repeatability, and zero fatigue. Humans own the moments where a wrong call costs the client a relationship, a sender's reputation, or a quarter of the pipeline.

Jeeshan Khan put it simply. "Senior marketers shouldn't be doing copy QA at 11 PM. They should be deciding what the brand stands for next quarter. We built LaCleo so the strategy stays human and the execution stops being the bottleneck. The AI does the work. Our team owns the judgment. 

The client gets results without hiring a 12-person growth team." That one sentence is the entire business model, and it is a model the industry has needed for years.

LaCleo currently operates out of India, the United States, and DIFC Dubai. They offer a free AI audit before any engagement, run a paid pilot with no lock-in, and operate on a managed retainer model that delivers results within two weeks. No long contracts.
